# Tymofii Pidlisnyi — Full Reference

> Product builder, serial entrepreneur, creative founder. Builder of the Agent Passport System — Apache-2.0 enforcement infrastructure for AI agents. Editor-in-Chief at The Agent Times. 10+ shipped products spanning AI, creative tooling, sustainability, and entertainment.

Updated: 2026-04-11
Canonical: https://tymofii.me/llms-full.txt
Compact: https://tymofii.me/llms.txt
License: CC-BY-4.0 (personal site content); linked code projects under their own licenses (mostly Apache-2.0).
Person URL: https://tymofii.me/
GitHub: https://github.com/aeoess
Email: tima_fey@yahoo.com

## Background

Tymofii Pidlisnyi (Тимофій Підлісний) was born and raised in Ukraine. He studied film directing at the Karpenko-Karyi National University of Theatre, Cinema and Television in Kyiv. He was on Maidan during the 2013-2014 Revolution of Dignity. After the war forced relocation, he moved to the United States and rebuilt from zero, transitioning from film to product. He is fluent in English, Ukrainian, and Russian. He lives in San Diego, California.

## What he is building now (primary)

**Agent Passport System (AEOESS).** Open-source enforcement infrastructure for AI agents. The protocol provides cryptographic identity (Ed25519), scoped delegation chains with monotonic narrowing, gateway enforcement boundary, Merkle attribution, and signed coordination receipts. The protocol is open and Apache-2.0 licensed. The gateway product is private. Live at https://aeoess.com. SDK on npm as agent-passport-system, on PyPI as agent-passport-system. MCP server as agent-passport-system-mcp. Two published papers on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18749779 and 10.5281/zenodo.19260073). One IETF Internet-Draft (draft-pidlisnyi-aps-00).

**The Agent Times.** First AI-native news publication where editorial decisions are made by AI agents under cryptographic governance. Tymofii is Editor-in-Chief. Live at https://theagenttimes.com.

## Past projects (selected)

- **Evatar.ai** — AI avatar platform for social media. Multiple Y Combinator applications. https://evatar.ai
- **DataDividend** — Compensation for data contribution to AI systems
- **Mingle** — LinkedIn-style professional networking inside chat interfaces
- **Pero Pero** — AI-powered creative tooling
- **ofNature** — Sustainable acetate-cellulose disposables replacing single-use plastic
- **Amplifier Entertainment Agency** — Entertainment talent and event management agency
- **Allset, Elegatto, HayStraws, M1.tv, NJF, PickAPoo, Prompt Director, SheetHappens, AuthorityTech, LeGreM** — earlier ventures spanning AI tools, sustainability, and creative platforms

## How he works

Tymofii ships fast and prefers running code over plans. He treats one real data point as more valuable than a perfect architecture. He builds in public, dogfoods his own protocols, and does not push back on building features for lack of users — the right system attracts the right agents. He communicates directly and concisely, prefers async, and reads voice transcription charitably.

His writing style avoids clickbait, em-dashes, opening filler ("strong proposal"), and bullet points in casual copy. Hooks come from curiosity gaps or concrete results. Show-don't-tell with code. Conversational tone.
